description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

【Eve Festival】Around Hanno Station North Exit and Hanno Yasaka Shrine

• Around 9:00 a.m. to 9:00 p.m.: Processional floats (bottomless yatai) carried through the neighborhood
• 11:45 a.m.: Prayer ceremony at Hanno Yasaka Shrine
• Food and local product stalls both days

No dedicated parking available. Please use public transportation (traffic restrictions in effect during the event at certain times and locations).

Inquiries: Oku-Musashi Hanno Tourism Association, 042-980-5051
location: 飯能八坂神社周辺（飯能駅北口すぐ）
